texto: I think my versatility is a big strength. I don't think anybody can guard me, just because I'm 6'10 and can dribble and play point. If I have a little guy on me, I take him to the post. For me to be able to then pass the ball, it helps me a lot.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Simmons sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I think my versatility is a big strength. I don't think anybody can guard me, just because I'm 6'…” articula reflexao, me, think em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como think e play.

frase_original: I think my versatility is a big strength. I don't think anybody can guard me, just because I'm 6'10 and can dribble and play point. If I have a little guy on me, I take him to the post. For me to be able to then pass the ball, it helps me a lot.
